Summary: Parser Enhancements
Description: Epic covering all improvements to the Google Docs PRD parser — the entry point of every SpecDrift sync.

Summary: CLI Improvements
Description: Epic covering developer experience improvements to the SpecDrift command line interface.

Summary: Drift Detection Engine
Description: Epic covering accuracy and coverage improvements to the core drift detection module.

Summary: GitHub Integration
Description: Epic covering improvements to GitHub PR linking and drift signal detection for unlinked PRs.

Summary: Dashboard Visualisation
Description: Epic covering frontend improvements to the SpecDrift drift report dashboard.

Summary: CI/CD Security Hardening
Description: Epic covering security and infrastructure improvements to the GitHub Actions deployment workflows.

Summary: Add Google Docs import support for nested PRD sections
Description: As a PM I want SpecDrift to correctly parse nested sections in my Google Docs PRD so that deeply structured roadmaps are fully captured in drift analysis.

Summary: Handle Google Docs tables as structured PRD metadata
Description: As a PM I want SpecDrift to read tables inside my PRD as structured metadata so that I can track status and ownership per section.

Summary: Add support for parsing PRD sections with custom heading styles
Description: As a PM I want SpecDrift to recognise custom heading styles in Google Docs so that teams with non-standard PRD formats are supported.

Summary: Improve parser resilience when Google Docs API rate limits
Description: As an engineer I want the parser to gracefully handle Google Docs API rate limit errors so that syncs do not fail silently during peak usage.

Summary: Add --watch mode to CLI for continuous drift monitoring
Description: As an engineer I want a --watch flag on the CLI so that SpecDrift automatically re-syncs at a configurable interval without manual intervention.

Summary: Add CLI command to diff two drift reports side by side
Description: As a PM I want to run specdrift diff to compare two drift snapshots so that I can see how alignment has changed between sprints.

Summary: Improve CLI output formatting for large PRDs with 20 or more sections
Description: As a PM I want the CLI output to be readable when my PRD has more than 20 sections so that I can quickly scan for red and amber signals.

Summary: Add specdrift status command showing last sync health
Description: As an engineer I want a specdrift status command so that I can quickly check when the last successful sync ran and whether any errors occurred.

Summary: Add confidence scoring to drift signals
Description: As a PM I want each drift signal to include a confidence score so that I can prioritise high-confidence signals over speculative ones.

Summary: Detect drift when PRD section is deleted but Jira story remains open
Description: As a PM I want SpecDrift to flag when a PRD section has been removed but its linked Jira story is still open so that orphaned work is surfaced.

Summary: Improve drift detection for multi-repo GitHub projects
Description: As an engineering lead I want SpecDrift to detect unlinked PRs across multiple GitHub repositories so that monorepo and multi-repo projects are fully covered.

Summary: Add historical drift trend analysis to detection report
Description: As a PM I want to see a trend chart showing how many sections were drifted over the last 4 sprints so that I can track whether alignment is improving.

Summary: Support custom drift rules via specdrift.yaml configuration
Description: As an engineering lead I want to define custom drift rules in specdrift.yaml so that our team can encode product-specific alignment requirements.

Summary: Support GitHub Enterprise in addition to GitHub.com
Description: As an enterprise user I want SpecDrift to connect to a GitHub Enterprise instance so that teams not on GitHub.com can use the tool.

Summary: Add PR comment bot improvements for clearer drift warnings
Description: As a developer I want the SpecDrift PR bot comment to clearly explain which PRD section my PR is linked to so that I can verify alignment before merging.

Summary: Detect draft PRs separately from merged PRs in drift analysis
Description: As a PM I want draft PRs to be shown separately in the drift report so that I can distinguish work in progress from completed work.

Summary: Link PRs to PRD sections using semantic similarity not just keywords
Description: As a PM I want SpecDrift to use semantic matching to link PRs to PRD sections so that PRs without explicit Jira references are still correctly attributed.

Summary: Add section health timeline chart to SectionDetailPanel
Description: As a PM I want to see a health timeline for each PRD section in the dashboard so that I can understand how a section's drift status has changed over time.

Summary: Add export to PDF for drift reports
Description: As a PM I want to export the current drift report as a PDF so that I can share it with stakeholders who do not have access to the dashboard.

Summary: Build PRD tree interactive visualisation on PrdTreePage
Description: As a PM I want an interactive tree view of my PRD structure in the dashboard so that I can navigate large PRDs and drill into drifted sections quickly.

Summary: Add real-time drift feed filtering on DriftFeedPage
Description: As an engineering lead I want to filter the drift feed by severity and section so that I can focus on critical signals without scrolling through all events.

Summary: Improve report rendering performance for large PRDs
Description: As a PM I want the dashboard to load instantly even for PRDs with 50 or more sections so that I am not waiting for the report to render in sprint reviews.

Summary: Add automated security scanning to deployment pipeline
Description: As an engineering lead I want the CI pipeline to run a security scan on every deployment so that vulnerabilities in the workflow are caught before they reach production.

Summary: Migrate dashboard deployment to new GitHub Pages workflow
Description: As an engineer I want to migrate the dashboard deployment to an updated GitHub Actions workflow so that we are using current and supported deployment actions.

Summary: Add environment-specific deployment gates to CI pipeline
Description: As an engineering lead I want deployment gates that require approval for production deployments so that no untested code reaches the live dashboard.
